name: 5.8" Christmas Plastic Spike Starburst Ornament Red - Wondershop™
description:
Bring celestial charm to your holiday decor with this 5.8-Inch Spike Starburst Christmas Tree Ornament from Wondershop™. Radiating with bright red glitter with spikes and sculptural elegance, this ornament exudes brilliance and festive vibes. Made from polystyrene and PET, it comes with a built-in loop for easy hanging from the branches.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
